branches.name: plus
branches.changelog:
v1.4.2 (plus)

Engine:
- Software: Fixed R_LoadTGA so even taskbar icon will be correct
- Fixed another heap corruption during bad internet connection
- Reverted SDL input changes, now you need `-userawinput` for 3rd-party mods
- Reverted keydown check to fix OpenAG input
- Added "fit" token support for background layout

GameUI:
- Applied HL25 changes for DrawBackgroundImage

ServerBrowser:
- Ignored "type" key while parsing mod list
